name: Salmon Ala Tandy Pro
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the salmon well and place in a glass bowl.
2. Juice the lemon over the fish and refrigerate for one half hour or so.
3. Meanwhile, melt the butter or margarine and add the dill weed.
4. Prepare a hot BBQ fire (or preheat oven to 400°F).
5. Grease the rack with non-stick spray (or prepare a baking dish in the same manner).
6. Rinse the salmon again and cover generously with dill-butter mixture.
7. Bake for 20 minutes or grill. If grilling, usually grill for 4 minutes per side.
